creator: motoom@xs4all.nl
text:
In the SEE ALSO section of the manpage lmc(4), there is a broken link:

   http://www.sbei.com/

This webserver doesn't seem to exist anymore; DNS is also unable to resolve sbei.com or www.sbei.com.

Fix: 

Remove the link from /usr/src/share/man/man4/lmc.4
How-To-Repeat: Try to open http://www.sbei.com/ in a webbrowser
